title: DLSA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Various Office Assistant Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority, Sonitpur (DLSA Sonitpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Various  Office Assistant Posts. Those candidates who have completed their Any Degree can use this chance and apply for the DLSA Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
